name: chaunyoms
description: Lightweight oms context engine plugin for OpenClaw.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:compiled
scripts.check: npm test && npm run eval:memory && npm run benchmark && npm audit --omit=dev
